segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: As the moment as we leave the European Union to reunite our country and allow the warmth and

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: natural affection that we all share for our European neighbours to find renewed expression in one great

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: new national project of building a deep, special and democratically accountable partnership

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: with those nations we are proud to call our closest friends. The Bill ensures that the implementation

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: period must end on the 31st of December next year with no possibility of an

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: extension and it paves the way for a new agreement on our future relationship

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: with our European neighbours based on an ambitious free trade agreement. Our aim

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: is to provide a close friendship between sovereign equals to promote our common

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: interests inspired by pride in our European heritage and civilization. I am

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: absolutely determined that this great project will not be the project of one

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: government or one party but of the British nation as I hold. So Parliament, so

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Parliament as I have said will be kept fully informed about the progress of
